title: The R Programming Environment Ecosystem
description: A flowchart illustrating the core components of the R environment and their interactions for data analysis and graphics.
relationships: User interacts with the R Console/IDE to write scripts and commands
Base R System loads Packages to extend its functionality
Functions import data from Data Sources into R's Data Structures
Analytical Functions process data from Data Structures
Results from analysis are sent to Graphics Devices to create Plots
